name: OpenScrub
description: Local video redaction: automatically detect and blur faces, full-body silhouettes, license plates, and on-screen PII (names, SSNs, addresses, custom regex) in videos and screen recordings — with a human review step before anything is trusted. Nothing leaves your machine.
short_desc: Blur faces, plates and PII in videos — locally, with human review
author: austinmabry
